title: Biome Heart
description: Use the creaking heart with different blocks to change the biome.
body:
A Creaking Heart can be activated with 2 Pale Oak Logs around it. This will allowing a Creaking to spawn.

With this datapack, you can stack the Creaking Heart with different blocks to change the biome. This is called a "Biome Heart".

| Blocks | Biome |
| ------ | ----- |
| Bamboo Block | Bamboo Jungle |
| Basalt | Basalt Deltas |
| Birch Log | Birch Forest |
| Cherry Log | Cherry Grove |
| Crimson Stem | Crimson Forest |
| Dark Oak Log | Dark Forest |
| Oak Log | Forest |
| Jungle Log | Jungle |
| Mangrove Log | Mangrove Swamp |
| Acacia Log | Savanna |
| Spruce Log | Taiga |
| Warped Stem | Warped Forest |
